name: signal
description: Signal channel for receiving and responding to Signal messages via signal-cli REST API

auth.instructions: Set up signal-cli-rest-api (https://github.com/bbernhard/signal-cli-rest-api) and register or link a phone number. If your API requires authentication, provide the token.
auth.token_hint: Optional API token for authenticated signal-cli-rest-api

required_secrets.name: signal_phone_number
required_secrets.prompt: Enter the Signal phone number registered with signal-cli (e.g. +1234567890)

required_secrets.name: signal_api_token
required_secrets.prompt: Enter the signal-cli-rest-api authentication token (leave empty if not required)
